Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**
 Fibrations in the bicat of univalent categories

 Contents:
 1. Internal Street Fibrations
 2. Internal Street Opfibrations
 *)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.StandardCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.StreetFibration.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.StreetOpFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetOpFibration.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
 1. Internal Street Fibrations
 *)
Section InternalSFibToStreetFib.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_univ_cats}
          {F : C₁ --> C₂}
          (HF : internal_sfib F).

  Section InternalSFibToStreetFibFactor.
    Context {G₁ G₂ : (unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats) --> C₁}
            {α : G₁ ==> G₂}
            (Hα : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α)
            {z : pr1 C₁}
            {g : z --> pr1 G₂ tt}
            {h : pr1 F z --> pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt)}
            (q : # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)).

    Let Φ : unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
      := functor_from_unit z.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
nat_trans_data Φ (pr1 G₂)
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
is_nat_trans Φ (pr1 G₂) ?t

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
nat_trans_data Φ (pr1 G₂)
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
pr1 C₁ ⟦ Φ tt, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧

        exact g.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
is_nat_trans Φ (pr1 G₂)
  ((λ x : unit_category,
    unit_rect
      (λ x0 : unit, pr1 C₁ ⟦ Φ x0, pr1 G₂ x0 ⟧) g x)
   :
   nat_trans_data Φ (pr1 G₂))
 abstract
          (intros x y f ; cbn ;
           induction x ; induction y ;
           cbn ;
           assert (p : f = identity _) ; [ apply isapropunit | ] ;
           rewrite p ;
           refine (id_left _ @ !(id_right _) @ _) ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           refine (!_) ;
           apply functor_id).
    Defined.

    Let ζ := internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F

q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F

q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
nat_trans_data (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)

z: pr1 C₁

q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
is_nat_trans (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F) ?t

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁

nat_trans_data (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
C₂ ⟦ (Φ ∙ F) tt, (G₁ ∙ F) tt ⟧

        exact h.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
is_nat_trans (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  ((λ x : unit_category,
    unit_rect
      (λ x0 : unit, C₂ ⟦ (Φ ∙ F) x0, (G₁ ∙ F) x0 ⟧) h
      x)
   :
   nat_trans_data (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F))
 abstract
          (intros x y f ; cbn ;
           induction x ; induction y ;
           cbn ;
           assert (p : f = identity _) ; [ apply isapropunit | ] ;
           rewrite p ;
           rewrite (functor_id G₁) ;
           rewrite !(functor_id F) ;
           rewrite id_left, id_right ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    Let ξ := internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ (post_whisker α F)

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ (post_whisker α F)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
has_homsets C₂
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
∏ x : unit_category,
post_whisker ζ F x =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ (post_whisker α F) x

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
has_homsets C₂

        apply homset_property.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
∏ x : unit_category,
post_whisker ζ F x =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ (post_whisker α F) x

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
post_whisker ζ F tt =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ (post_whisker α F)
  tt

      exact q.
    Qed.

    Let p := internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_eq.

    Definition internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor
      : z --> pr1 G₁ tt
      := pr1 (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor _ Hα ζ ξ p) tt.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
p:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ
  (post_whisker α F)
# (pr1 F) internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor = h

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
p:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ
  (post_whisker α F)
# (pr1 F) internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor = h

      exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise
              (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor_over _ Hα p)
              tt).
    Qed.

q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)

        exact k.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
p:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ
  (post_whisker α F)
k: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₁ tt ⟧
is_nat_trans Φ (pr1 G₁)
  ((λ x : unit_category,
    unit_rect
      (λ x0 : unit, pr1 C₁ ⟦ Φ x0, pr1 G₁ x0 ⟧) k x)
   :
   nat_trans_data Φ (pr1 G₁))
 abstract
          (intros x y f ;
           induction x ; induction y ; cbn ;
           assert (r : f = identity _) ; [ apply isapropunit | ] ;
           rewrite r ;
           rewrite !(functor_id G₁) ;
           rewrite id_left, id_right ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
p:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ
  (post_whisker α F)
isaprop
  (∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₁ tt ⟧,
   # (pr1 F) φ = h × φ · pr1 α tt = g)

isPredicate
  (λ x : C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₁ tt ⟧,
   # (pr1 F) x = h × x · pr1 α tt = g)

ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
p:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ
  (post_whisker α F)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₁ tt ⟧,
# (pr1 F) φ = h × φ · pr1 α tt = g
x: C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₁ tt ⟧
isaprop (# (pr1 F) x = h × x · pr1 α tt = g)

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧

Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
p:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ
  (post_whisker α F)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₁ tt ⟧,
# (pr1 F) φ = h × φ · pr1 α tt = g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)

  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ
  (post_whisker α F)

# (pr1 F) φ = h × φ · pr1 α tt = g
# (pr1 F) (pr1 φ₁) = h
 exact (pr12 φ₁).

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁

ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
p:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ
  (post_whisker α F)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₁ tt ⟧,
# (pr1 F) φ = h × φ · pr1 α tt = g
pr1 φ₁ · α tt = g
 exact (pr22 φ₁).
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: pr1 C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F z, pr1 F (pr1 G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = h · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt)
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_1: Φ ⟹ pr1 G₂
ξ:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_nat_trans_2: Φ ∙ F ⟹ G₁ ∙ F
p:= internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (Φ ∙ F) (G₁ ∙ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) ξ
  (post_whisker α F)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ z, pr1 G₁ tt ⟧,
# (pr1 F) φ = h × φ · pr1 α tt = g
pr1 φ₂ · α tt = g
 exact (pr22 φ₂).
    Qed.
  End InternalSFibToStreetFibFactor.

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α tt)

z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ F z, F (G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # F g = h · # F (pr1 α tt)
∃! φ : C₁ ⟦ z, G₁ tt ⟧, # F φ = h × φ · pr1 α tt = g

q: # F g = h · # F (pr1 α tt)
isaprop
  (∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ z, G₁ tt ⟧, # F φ = h × φ · pr1 α tt = g)

q: # F g = h · # F (pr1 α tt)
isaprop
  (∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ z, G₁ tt ⟧, # F φ = h × φ · pr1 α tt = g)
 exact (internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_unique Hα q).

h: C₂ ⟦ F z, F (G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # F g = h · # F (pr1 α tt)
C₁ ⟦ z, G₁ tt ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: internal_sfib F

⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α

g: C₁ ⟦ z, G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ F z, F (G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # F g = h · # F (pr1 α tt)
# F ?pr1 = h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ F z, F (G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # F g = h · # F (pr1 α tt)
(λ _ : # F ?pr1 = h, ?pr1 · pr1 α tt = g) ?pr10

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ F z, F (G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # F g = h · # F (pr1 α tt)
C₁ ⟦ z, G₁ tt ⟧
 exact (internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor Hα q).
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ F z, F (G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # F g = h · # F (pr1 α tt)
# F (internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor Hα q) = h
 exact (internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_over Hα q).
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
z: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ z, G₂ tt ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ F z, F (G₁ tt) ⟧
q: # F g = h · # F (pr1 α tt)
(λ _ : # F
         (internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor Hα q) =
       h,
 internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor Hα q
 · pr1 α tt = g)
  (internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_over Hα q)
 exact (internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib_factor_comm Hα q).
  Defined.

  Section Cleaving.
    Context {e : pr1 C₁}
            {b : pr1 C₂}
            (f : b --> pr1 F e).

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: pr1 C₂ ⟦ b, pr1 F e ⟧
functor_from_unit b ⟹ functor_from_unit e ∙ F

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: pr1 C₂ ⟦ b, pr1 F e ⟧
functor_from_unit b ⟹ functor_from_unit e ∙ F

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: pr1 C₂ ⟦ b, pr1 F e ⟧
nat_trans_data (functor_from_unit b)
  (functor_from_unit e ∙ F)
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: pr1 C₂ ⟦ b, pr1 F e ⟧
is_nat_trans (functor_from_unit b)
  (functor_from_unit e ∙ F) ?t

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: pr1 C₂ ⟦ b, pr1 F e ⟧
nat_trans_data (functor_from_unit b)
  (functor_from_unit e ∙ F)
 exact (λ _, f).
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: pr1 C₂ ⟦ b, pr1 F e ⟧
is_nat_trans (functor_from_unit b)
  (functor_from_unit e ∙ F) (λ _ : unit_category, f)
 abstract
          (intros z₁ z₂ g ; cbn ;
           rewrite id_left, functor_id, id_right ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    Let ℓ := pr1 HF _ _ _ internal_sfib_is_street_fib_nat_trans.

    Definition internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_ob
      : pr1 C₁
      := pr1 (pr1 ℓ) tt.

    Definition internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_mor
      : internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_ob --> e
      := pr1 (pr12 ℓ) tt.

    Definition internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_z_iso
      : z_iso (pr1 F internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_ob) b
      := nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso _ _ (pr122 ℓ)) tt.

    Definition internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_over
      : # (pr1 F) internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_mor
        =
        internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_z_iso · f
      := nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr2 (pr222 ℓ)) tt.

    Definition internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_cartesian
      : is_cartesian_sfib F internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_mor
      := internal_sfib_is_cartesian_sfib (pr1 (pr222 ℓ)).
  End Cleaving.

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
street_fib F

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
street_fib F

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ b, F e ⟧
∑ (bb : C₁) (ff_i : C₁ ⟦ bb, e ⟧ × z_iso (F bb) b),
# F (pr1 ff_i) = pr2 ff_i · f
× is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 ff_i)

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ b, F e ⟧
C₁
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ b, F e ⟧
C₁ ⟦ ?Goal, e ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ b, F e ⟧
z_iso (F ?Goal) b
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ b, F e ⟧
# F ?Goal0 = ?Goal1 · f
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ b, F e ⟧
is_cartesian_sfib F ?Goal0

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ b, F e ⟧
C₁
 exact (internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_ob f).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ b, F e ⟧
C₁ ⟦ internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_ob f, e ⟧
 exact (internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_mor f).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ b, F e ⟧
z_iso (F (internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_ob f)) b
 exact (internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_z_iso f).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ b, F e ⟧
# F (internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_mor f) =
internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_z_iso f · f
 exact (internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_over f).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ b, F e ⟧
is_cartesian_sfib F
  (internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_mor f)
 exact (internal_sfib_is_street_fib_lift_cartesian f).
  Defined.
End InternalSFibToStreetFib.

Section StreetFibToInternalSFib.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_univ_cats}
          {F : C₁ --> C₂}
          (HF : street_fib F).

  Section IsCartesian.
    Context {C₀ : bicat_of_univ_cats}
            {G₁ G₂ : C₀ --> C₁}
            (α : G₁ ==> G₂)
            (Hα : ∏ (x : pr1 C₀), is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)).

    Section Factorization.
      Context {H : C₀ --> C₁}
              {β : H ==> G₂}
              {δp : H · F ==> G₁ · F}
              (q : β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)).

      Definition pointwise_cartesian_is_cartesian_factor_data
        : nat_trans_data (pr1 H) (pr1 G₁)
        := λ x,
           cartesian_factorization_sfib
             _
             (Hα x)
             (pr1 β x)
             (pr1 δp x)
             (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x).

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
is_nat_trans (pr1 H) (pr1 G₁)
  pointwise_cartesian_is_cartesian_factor_data

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
is_nat_trans (pr1 H) (pr1 G₁)
  pointwise_cartesian_is_cartesian_factor_data

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 H) f
· cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) =
cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· # (pr1 G₁) f

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
# (pr1 H) f
· cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) =
cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· # (pr1 G₁) f

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# (pr1 H) f
· cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) =
cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· # (pr1 G₁) f

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# F (pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f) · # F (pr1 α y)
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# F
  (# (pr1 H) f
   · cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
       (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
     (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
   · # (pr1 G₁) f) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# (pr1 H) f
· cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) · pr1 α y =
pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· # (pr1 G₁) f · pr1 α y = pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# F (pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f) · # F (pr1 α y)
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# F (pr1 β x) · # F (# (pr1 G₂) f) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f) · # F (pr1 α y)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = δp x · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)
# F (pr1 β x) · # F (# (pr1 G₂) f) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f) · # F (pr1 α y)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = δp x · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)
# F (pr1 β x) · # F (# (pr1 G₂) f) = ?b
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = δp x · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)
?b =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f) · # F (pr1 α y)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = δp x · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)
# F (pr1 β x) · # F (# (pr1 G₂) f) = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = δp x · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)
# F (pr1 β x) = ?y'

            exact r.
          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = δp x · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)
δp x · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · # F (# (pr1 G₂) f) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f) · # F (pr1 α y)

β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)

  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)

· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · # F (# (pr1 G₂) f) =
# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f) · # F (pr1 α y)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# F (pr1 α x · # (pr1 G₂) f) =
# F (# (pr1 G₁) f · pr1 α y)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
pr1 α x · # (pr1 G₂) f = # (pr1 G₁) f · pr1 α y

          exact (!(nat_trans_ax α _ _ f)).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# F
  (# (pr1 H) f
   · cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
       (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# F (# (pr1 H) f)
· # F
    (cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
       (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# F (# (pr1 H) f) · pr1 δp y =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)

          exact (nat_trans_ax δp _ _ f).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)

p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
     (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
   · # (pr1 G₁) f) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)

· # F (# (pr1 G₁) f) =

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
pr1 δp x · # F (# (pr1 G₁) f) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)

          apply idpath.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# (pr1 H) f
· cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) · pr1 α y =
pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# (pr1 H) f
· (cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
     (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) · pr1 α y) =
pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f

HF: street_fib F

α: G₁ ==> G₂

β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)

  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# (pr1 H) f
· (cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
     (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) · pr1 α y) =
?b

q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)

  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)

?b = pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f

α: G₁ ==> G₂

β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) · pr1 α y =
?t2

            exact p'.
          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
# (pr1 H) f · pr1 β y = pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f

          exact (nat_trans_ax β _ _ f).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· # (pr1 G₁) f · pr1 α y = pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f

q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)

cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· (# (pr1 G₁) f · pr1 α y) = pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f

· (# (pr1 G₁) f · pr1 α y) = ?b

q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· (α x · # G₂ f) = pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) · α x
· # G₂ f = pr1 β x · # (pr1 G₂) f

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· pr1 α x = pr1 β x
p':= cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
  (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)
· pr1 α y = pr1 β y
cartesian_factorization_sfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) · α x =
pr1 β x

          exact p.
      Qed.

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
H ==> G₁

q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)

β: H ==> G₂

q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
δ₁, δ₂: ∑ δ : H ==> G₁, δ ▹ F = δp × δ • α = β
∏ x : C₀, pr1 δ₁ x = pr1 δ₂ x

x: C₀
pr1 δ₁ x = pr1 δ₂ x

q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)

x: C₀
# F (pr1 β x) = pr1 δp x · # F (pr1 α x)
 exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x).

q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
δ₁, δ₂: ∑ δ : H ==> G₁, δ ▹ F = δp × δ • α = β
x: C₀
pr1 δ₂ x · pr1 α x = pr1 β x
 exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 δ₂) x).
      Qed.
    End Factorization.

β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
H ==> G₁
 exact (pointwise_cartesian_is_cartesian_factor q).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
pointwise_cartesian_is_cartesian_factor q ▹ F = δp
 exact (pointwise_cartesian_is_cartesian_over q).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: H ==> G₂
δp: H · F ==> G₁ · F
q: β ▹ F = δp • (α ▹ F)
(λ _ : pointwise_cartesian_is_cartesian_factor q ▹ F =
       δp,
 pointwise_cartesian_is_cartesian_factor q • α = β)
  (pointwise_cartesian_is_cartesian_over q)
 exact (pointwise_cartesian_is_cartesian_comm q).
    Defined.
  End IsCartesian.

  Section Cleaving.
    Context {C₀ : bicat_of_univ_cats}
            {G₁ : C₀ --> C₂}
            {G₂ : C₀ --> C₁}
            (α : G₁ ==> G₂ · F).

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
functor_data (pr1 C₀) (pr1 C₁)

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
functor_data (pr1 C₀) (pr1 C₁)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
pr1 C₀ → pr1 C₁
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
∏ a b : pr1 C₀,
pr1 C₀ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 C₁ ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
pr1 C₀ → pr1 C₁
 exact (λ x, pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))).
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
∏ a b : pr1 C₀,
pr1 C₀ ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ pr1 C₁
  ⟦ (λ x : pr1 C₀,
     pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))) a,
  (λ x : pr1 C₀,
   pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))) b ⟧
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)),
pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)) ⟧

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₁ ⟦ pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)),
pr1 G₂ y ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))),
F (pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))) ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F ?g =
?h · # F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₁ ⟦ pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)),
pr1 G₂ y ⟧
 exact (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)) · # (pr1 G₂) f).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))),
F (pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))) ⟧
 exact (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
                 · # (pr1 G₁) f
                 · inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₂) f) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) f
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
· # F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
 abstract
            (rewrite functor_comp ;
             rewrite (pr122 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))) ;
             rewrite !assoc' ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             refine (!(nat_trans_ax α _ _ f) @ _) ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             refine (!_) ;
             use z_iso_inv_on_right ;
             rewrite (pr122 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))) ;
             apply idpath).
    Defined.

F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
is_functor
  street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data

  street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x: pr1 C₀
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))))
  (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
     x x (id₁ x)) =
id₁ (pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)))

  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)))

  (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
     x x (id₁ x))
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))

pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· id₁ (G₂ x) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))

          apply id_right.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x: pr1 C₀
id₁ (pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)))
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
 apply id_left.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
functor_compax
  street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))
  (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
     x z (f · g)) =
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₁) f
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))))
  (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
     x y f)
· cartesian_factorization_sfib F
    (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
     · # (pr1 G₂) g)
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
     · # (pr1 G₁) g
     · inv_from_z_iso
         (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))
    (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
       y z g)

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁ ⟦ pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)),
pr1 G₂ z ⟧

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))),
F (pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))) ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F ?g =
?h · # F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))
     (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x z (f · g))) = ?h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₂) f)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₁) f
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))))
     (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x y f)
   · cartesian_factorization_sfib F
       (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
        · # (pr1 G₂) g)
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
        · # (pr1 G₁) g
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))
       (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
          y z g)) = ?h

  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))

   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))

     x z (f · g))
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)) = ?g

x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₁) f
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))))

     x y f)
· cartesian_factorization_sfib F
    (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
     · # (pr1 G₂) g)
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
     · # (pr1 G₁) g
     · inv_from_z_iso
         (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))
    (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
       y z g)
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)) = ?g

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁ ⟦ pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)),
pr1 G₂ z ⟧
 exact (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)) · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))),
F (pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))) ⟧
 exact (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
                 · # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
                 · inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
· # F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # F (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
· # F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # F (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
· # F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))

g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # F (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) = ?b

G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))) = ?y'

            exact (pr122 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))).
          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)) · pr1 α x
· # F (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
· # F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· (pr1 α x · # F (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
      · # F
          (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 α x · # F (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) =
# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
   · # F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# G₁ (f · g) · α z =
# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
   · # F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
α z =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
· # F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
· # F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))) =
α z

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)) · α z

          exact (pr122 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))
     (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x z (f · g))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
 apply cartesian_factorization_sfib_over.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₂) f)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₁) f
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))))
     (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x y f)
   · cartesian_factorization_sfib F
       (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
        · # (pr1 G₂) g)
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
        · # (pr1 G₁) g
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))
       (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
          y z g)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))

α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₂) f)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₁) f
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))))
     (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x y f))
· # F
    (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
       (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
        · # (pr1 G₂) g)
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
        · # (pr1 G₁) g
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))
       (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
          y z g)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) f
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
· (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
   · # (pr1 G₁) g
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))) =

· # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))

G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· (# (pr1 G₁) f
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
      · (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))

            · inv_from_z_iso
                (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z)
                          (pr1 α z))))))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))

g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧

· (inv_from_z_iso

id₁ (pr1 G₁ y) · # (pr1 G₁) g = # G₁ g

          apply id_left.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))
  (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
     x z (f · g))
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
 apply cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute.

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₁) f

       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))))

     x y f)
· cartesian_factorization_sfib F
    (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)))
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
     · # (pr1 G₂) g)
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))

         (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z))))
    (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
       y z g)
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 G₁ z) (pr1 α z)) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
