  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₁) f
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))))
  (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
     x y f)
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))
· # (pr1 G₂) g =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₂) f · # (pr1 G₂) g =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)

α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· (# (pr1 G₂) f · # (pr1 G₂) g) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· (# (pr1 G₂) f · # (pr1 G₂) g) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· (# G₂ f · # G₂ g)

          apply idpath.
    Qed.

is_functor
  street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data
 exact street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_is_functor.
    Defined.

    Definition street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor_data
      : nat_trans_data
          street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data
          (pr1 G₂)
      := λ x, pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)).

  (pr1 G₂)
  street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor_data

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
   · # (pr1 G₁) f
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))))
  (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
     x y f)
· street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor_data y =
street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor_data x
· # (pr1 G₂) f

      apply cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute.
    Qed.

α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₂) f)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₁) f
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))))
     (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x y f))
· street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_over_nat_trans_data
    y =
street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_over_nat_trans_data
  x · # (pr1 G₁) f

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₂) f)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
      · # (pr1 G₁) f
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y))))
     (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x y f))
· pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) f

α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F

f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) f
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
· pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))
· # (pr1 G₁) f

   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))
      · pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 G₁ y) (pr1 α y)))) =

· # (pr1 G₁) f

· # (pr1 G₁) f

is_cartesian_sfib F
  (pr1 street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor x)

      exact (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x))).
    Defined.

α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
∑ (h : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧) (γ : h ==> G₂)
(β : invertible_2cell (h · F) G₁),
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F γ × γ ▹ F = β • α

 exact (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_over α).

G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧

  (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor α)
 exact (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cartesian α).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂ · F
(λ _ : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F
         (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor
            α),
 street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor α ▹ F =
 street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_over α • α)
  (street_fib_is_internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cartesian
     α)
 abstract
        (use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
         intro x ; cbn ;
         exact (pr122 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 G₁ x) (pr1 α x)))).
  Defined.

  Section IsCartesian.
    Context {C₀ : bicat_of_univ_cats}
            {G₁ G₂ : C₀ --> C₁}
            (α : G₁ ==> G₂)
            (Hα : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α).

F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
functor_data (pr1 C₀) (pr1 C₁)

HF: street_fib F

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
pr1 C₀ → pr1 C₁
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
∏ a b : pr1 C₀,
pr1 C₀ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 C₁ ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
pr1 C₀ → pr1 C₁
 exact (λ x, pr1 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))).
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
∏ a b : pr1 C₀,
pr1 C₀ ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ pr1 C₁
  ⟦ (λ x : pr1 C₀,
     pr1
       (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
          (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) a,
  (λ x : pr1 C₀,
   pr1
     (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
        (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) b ⟧
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 C₁
⟦ pr1
    (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
       (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))),
pr1
  (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
     (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) ⟧

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₁
⟦ pr1
    (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
       (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))), pr1 G₂ y ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₂
⟦ F
    (pr1
       (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
          (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))),
F
  (pr1
     (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
        (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))) ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F ?g =
?h
· # F
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₁
⟦ pr1
    (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
       (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))), pr1 G₂ y ⟧
 exact (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
                 · # (pr1 G₂) f).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₂
⟦ F
    (pr1
       (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
          (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))),
F
  (pr1
     (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
        (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))) ⟧
 exact (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
                 · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
                 · inv_from_z_iso
                     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
· # F
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
 abstract
            (rewrite functor_comp ;
             rewrite (pr122 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) ;
             rewrite !assoc' ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite <- (functor_comp F) ;
             etrans ;
             [ apply maponpaths ;
               exact (!(nat_trans_ax α _ _ f))
             | ] ;
             rewrite functor_comp ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             refine (!_) ;
             use z_iso_inv_on_right ;
             rewrite (pr122 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))) ;
             apply idpath).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
is_functor pointwise_lift_functor_data

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
functor_idax pointwise_lift_functor_data
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x x (id₁ x)) =
id₁
  (pr1
     (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
        (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
C₁
⟦ pr1
    (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
       (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))), pr1 G₂ x ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
C₂
⟦ F
    (pr1
       (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
          (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))),
F
  (pr1
     (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
        (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
# F ?g =
?h
· # F
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x))
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))
     (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x x (id₁ x))) =
?h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
# F
  (id₁
     (pr1
        (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))) = ?h

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x x (id₁ x))
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) = ?g

        (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) = ?g

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
C₁
⟦ pr1
    (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
       (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))), pr1 G₂ x ⟧
 exact (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂

x: pr1 C₀
C₂
⟦ F
    (pr1
       (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
          (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))),
F
  (pr1
     (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
        (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) ⟧
 apply identity.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
# F
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) =
id₁
  (F
     (pr1
        (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))
· # F
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
# F
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) =
# F
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))

          apply idpath.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x))
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))
     (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x x (id₁ x))) =
id₁
  (F
     (pr1
        (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))

Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) =

  (F
     (pr1

           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))

Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α

id₁
  (F

           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))

Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α

         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x)) =

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (id₁ (G₁ x)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · id₁ (F (G₁ x)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))

          apply id_right.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
# F
  (id₁
     (pr1
        (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))) =
id₁
  (F
     (pr1
        (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))
 apply functor_id.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x x (id₁ x))
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · id₁ (G₂ x) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))

          apply id_right.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
id₁
  (pr1
     (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
        (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
 apply id_left.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
functor_compax pointwise_lift_functor_data
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x z (f · g)) =
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
· cartesian_factorization_sfib F
    (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) · # (pr1 G₂) g)
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
     · inv_from_z_iso
         (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
    (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof y z g)

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁
⟦ pr1
    (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
       (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))), pr1 G₂ z ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₂
⟦ F
    (pr1
       (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
          (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))),
F
  (pr1
     (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
        (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F ?g =
?h
· # F
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
     (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x z (f · g))) =
?h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
     (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
   · cartesian_factorization_sfib F
       (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) · # (pr1 G₂) g)
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                      (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
       (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof y z g)) =
?h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x z (f · g))
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) = ?g
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
· cartesian_factorization_sfib F
    (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) · # (pr1 G₂) g)
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
     · inv_from_z_iso
         (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
    (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof y z g)
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) = ?g

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁
⟦ pr1
    (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
       (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))), pr1 G₂ z ⟧
 exact (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
                 · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₂
⟦ F
    (pr1
       (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
          (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))),
F
  (pr1
     (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
        (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) ⟧
 exact (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
                 · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
                 · inv_from_z_iso
                     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
· # F
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # F (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
· # F
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)
· # F (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
· # F
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · # F (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
      · # F
          (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · # F (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) =
# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
   · # F
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (pr1 α x · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) =
# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
   · # F
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (pr1 α x · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
   · # F
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (pr1 α x · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)) = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 α x · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g) = ?t2

            exact (!(nat_trans_ax α _ _ (f · g))).
          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (# G₁ (f · g) · α z) =
# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
   · # F
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (# G₁ (f · g)) · # F (α z) =
# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
   · # F
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (α z) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
· # F
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
· # F
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) = # F (α z)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) · # F (α z)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α z) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) · # F (α z)

          apply idpath.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
     (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x z (f · g))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
 apply cartesian_factorization_sfib_over.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
     (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
   · cartesian_factorization_sfib F
       (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) · # (pr1 G₂) g)
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                      (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
       (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof y z g)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
     (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f))
· # F
    (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
       (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) · # (pr1 G₂) g)
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                      (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
       (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof y z g)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
· (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
· (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# G₁ f · # G₁ g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
· (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (# F (# G₁ f) · # F (# G₁ g))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
      · (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
         · (# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
            · inv_from_z_iso
                (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z)
                          (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                          (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))))) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (# F (# G₁ f)
   · (# F (# G₁ g)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
· (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
   · (# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))) =
# F (# G₁ g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
· pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) =
# F (# G₁ g)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
· pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g) = # F (# G₁ g)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
· (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)) = # F (# G₁ g)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) · # F (# G₁ g)

          apply idpath.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x z (f · g))
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
 apply cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
· cartesian_factorization_sfib F
    (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) · # (pr1 G₂) g)
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
     · inv_from_z_iso
         (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
    (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof y z g)
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
· (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) · # (pr1 G₂) g)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) g)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))
     (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof y z g)
   · pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ z) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
· (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) · # (pr1 G₂) g) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) · # (pr1 G₂) g =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f
· # (pr1 G₂) g =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (# (pr1 G₂) f · # (pr1 G₂) g) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (# (pr1 G₂) f · # (pr1 G₂) g) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · (# G₂ f · # G₂ g)

          apply idpath.
    Qed.

Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
functor_data C₀ C₁
 exact pointwise_lift_functor_data.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
is_functor pointwise_lift_functor_data
 exact pointwise_lift_functor_is_functor.
    Defined.

    Definition pointwise_lift_nat_trans_data
      : nat_trans_data pointwise_lift_functor_data (pr1 G₂)
      := λ x, pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))).

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
is_nat_trans pointwise_lift_functor_data (pr1 G₂)
  pointwise_lift_nat_trans_data

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
is_nat_trans pointwise_lift_functor_data (pr1 G₂)
  pointwise_lift_nat_trans_data

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
· pointwise_lift_nat_trans_data y =
pointwise_lift_nat_trans_data x · # (pr1 G₂) f

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
cartesian_factorization_sfib F
  (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
  (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
· pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) =
pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f

      apply cartesian_factorization_sfib_commute.
    Qed.

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
pointwise_lift_functor ==> G₂

is_nat_trans pointwise_lift_functor G₂
  pointwise_lift_nat_trans_data
 exact pointwise_lift_is_nat_trans.
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_fib F

HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
∏ x : pr1 C₀,
is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 pointwise_lift_nat_trans x)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
is_cartesian_sfib F (pr1 pointwise_lift_nat_trans x)

      exact (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
nat_trans_data (G₁ ∙ F) (pointwise_lift_functor ∙ F)

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
nat_trans_data (G₁ ∙ F) (pointwise_lift_functor ∙ F)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: C₀
C₂ ⟦ (G₁ ∙ F) x, (pointwise_lift_functor ∙ F) x ⟧

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: C₀
i:= pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))): (λ _ : C₁
       ⟦ pr1
           (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))), pr1 G₂ x ⟧,
 z_iso
   (F
      (pr1
         (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))
   (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x)))
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
C₂ ⟦ (G₁ ∙ F) x, (pointwise_lift_functor ∙ F) x ⟧

      exact (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
is_nat_trans (G₁ ∙ F) (pointwise_lift_functor ∙ F)
  is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_pointwise_cartesian_over_data

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
is_nat_trans (G₁ ∙ F) (pointwise_lift_functor ∙ F)
  is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_pointwise_cartesian_over_data

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F (# G₁ f)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # F
    (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
       (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                      (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
       (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # F
    (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
       (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                      (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
       (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)) =
# F (# G₁ f)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
     (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (# F (# G₁ f)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
     (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f)) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # F (# G₁ f)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # F (# G₁ f) =
# F
  (cartesian_factorization_sfib F
     (pr222 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # (pr1 G₂) f)
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))
     (pointwise_lift_functor_data_subproof x y f))
· pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # F (# G₁ f) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
· pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) · # F (# G₁ f) =
pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
      · pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F (# G₁ f) =
# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
   · pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ y) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F (# G₁ f) =
# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f) · id₁ (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ y))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F (# G₁ f) = # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₁) f)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂

x: C₀
# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) =
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_pointwise_cartesian_over_data
  x · # (pr1 F) (pointwise_lift_nat_trans_data x)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: C₀
# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) =
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_pointwise_cartesian_over_data
  x
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: C₀
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_pointwise_cartesian_over_data
  x
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) =
# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

x: C₀
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_pointwise_cartesian_over_data
  x
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: C₀
?b = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_fib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: C₀
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_pointwise_cartesian_over_data
  x
· # (pr1 F)
    (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: C₀
# (pr1 F)
  (pr112 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) = ?t2

        exact (pr122 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))).
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib F α
x: C₀
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_pointwise_cartesian_over_data
  x
· (pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)) = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)

  x
· pr212 (HF (pr1 G₂ x) (pr1 F (pr1 G₁ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)

id₁ (F (G₁ x)) · # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) =
# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)

      apply id_left.
    Qed.

 exact (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso _ _ i) x
              · pr1 pointwise_lift_nat_trans x).

     pointwise_lift_functor i) x
· pr1 pointwise_lift_nat_trans x = pr1 α x

(**
 2. Internal Street Opfibrations
 *)
Section InternalSOpFibToStreetOpFib.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_univ_cats}
          {F : C₁ --> C₂}
          (HF : internal_sopfib F).

  Section InternalSOpFibToStreetOpFibFactor.
    Context {G₁ G₂ : (unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats) --> C₁}
            {α : G₁ ==> G₂}
            (Hα : is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α)
            {z : pr1 C₁}
            {g : pr1 G₁ tt --> z}
            {h : pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt) --> pr1 F z}
            (q : # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h).

    Let Φ : unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
      := functor_from_unit z.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂

z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ

Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁

α: G₁ ==> G₂

z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, Φ tt ⟧

        exact g.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
is_nat_trans (pr1 G₁) Φ
  ((λ x : unit_category,
    unit_rect (λ x0 : unit, C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ x0, Φ x0 ⟧) g
      x)
   :
   nat_trans_data (pr1 G₁) Φ)
 abstract
          (intros x y f ; cbn ;
           induction x ; induction y ;
           cbn ;
           assert (p : f = identity _) ; [ apply isapropunit | ] ;
           rewrite p ;
           rewrite (functor_id G₁) ;
           rewrite id_left, id_right ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    Let ζ := internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F

q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h

ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
C₂ ⟦ (G₂ · F) tt, (Φ ∙ F) tt ⟧

        exact h.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
is_nat_trans (G₂ · F) (Φ ∙ F)
  ((λ x : unit_category,
    unit_rect
      (λ x0 : unit, C₂ ⟦ (G₂ · F) x0, (Φ ∙ F) x0 ⟧) h
      x)
   :
   nat_trans_data (G₂ · F) (Φ ∙ F))
 abstract
          (intros x y f ; cbn ;
           induction x ; induction y ;
           cbn ;
           assert (p : f = identity _) ; [ apply isapropunit | ] ;
           rewrite p ;
           rewrite (functor_id G₂) ;
           rewrite !(functor_id F) ;
           rewrite id_left, id_right ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    Let ξ := internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)
  (post_whisker α F) ξ

ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)

  (post_whisker α F) ξ

has_homsets C₂

HF: internal_sopfib F

⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧

ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
∏ x : unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats,
post_whisker ζ F x =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)
  (post_whisker α F) ξ x

⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧

z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h

ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
has_homsets C₂

        apply homset_property.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧

post_whisker ζ F x =

  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧

Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁

ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
post_whisker ζ F tt =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)
  (post_whisker α F) ξ tt

      exact q.
    Qed.

    Let p := internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_eq.

    Definition internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor
      : pr1 G₂ tt --> z
      := pr1 (is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_factor _ Hα ζ ξ p) tt.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
p:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)
  (post_whisker α F) ξ
# (pr1 F) internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor =
h

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
p:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)
  (post_whisker α F) ξ
# (pr1 F) internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor =
h

      exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise
               (is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_factor_over _ Hα _ _ p)
               tt).
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
p:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)
  (post_whisker α F) ξ
pr1 α tt
· internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor = g

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
p:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)
  (post_whisker α F) ξ
pr1 α tt
· internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor = g

      exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise
               (is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_factor_comm _ Hα _ _ p)
               tt).
    Qed.
