C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
p:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)
  (post_whisker α F) ξ
k: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₂ tt, z ⟧
is_nat_trans (pr1 G₂) Φ
  ((λ x : unit_category,
    unit_rect (λ x0 : unit, C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₂ x0, Φ x0 ⟧) k
      x)
   :
   nat_trans_data (pr1 G₂) Φ)
 abstract
          (intros x y f ;
           induction x ; induction y ; cbn ;
           assert (r : f = identity _) ; [ apply isapropunit | ] ;
           rewrite r ;
           rewrite !(functor_id G₂) ;
           rewrite id_left, id_right ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
p:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)
  (post_whisker α F) ξ
isaprop
  (∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₂ tt, z ⟧,
   # (pr1 F) φ = h × pr1 α tt · φ = g)

HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
p:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)
  (post_whisker α F) ξ
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₂ tt, z ⟧,
# (pr1 F) φ = h × pr1 α tt · φ = g
x: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₂ tt, z ⟧
isaprop (# (pr1 F) x = h × pr1 α tt · x = g)

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
z: pr1 C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₁ tt, z ⟧
h: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F (pr1 G₂ tt), pr1 F z ⟧
q: # (pr1 F) g = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α tt) · h
Φ:= functor_from_unit z: unit_category ⟶ pr1 C₁
ζ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_1: pr1 G₁ ⟹ Φ
ξ:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_nat_trans_2: G₂ · F ==> Φ ∙ F
p:= internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_eq: post_whisker ζ F =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G₁ F)
  (functor_composite_data G₂ F) (Φ ∙ F)
  (post_whisker α F) ξ
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : C₁ ⟦ pr1 G₂ tt, z ⟧,
# (pr1 F) φ = h × pr1 α tt · φ = g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

# (pr1 F) (pr1 φ₁) = h

  End InternalSOpFibToStreetOpFibFactor.

q: # F g = # F (pr1 α tt) · h
(λ _ : # F ?pr1 = h, pr1 α tt · ?pr1 = g) ?pr10

C₁ ⟦ G₂ tt, z ⟧
 exact (internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor Hα q).

⟦ unit_category : bicat_of_univ_cats, C₁ ⟧

# F
  (internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor Hα q) =
h
 exact (internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_over Hα q).
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

q: # F g = # F (pr1 α tt) · h
(λ _ : # F
         (internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor
            Hα q) = h,
 pr1 α tt
 · internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor Hα q =
 g)
  (internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_over
     Hα q)
 exact (internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib_factor_comm Hα q).
  Defined.

  Section OpCleaving.
    Context {e : pr1 C₁}
            {b : pr1 C₂}
            (f : pr1 F e --> b).

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F e, b ⟧
functor_from_unit e ∙ F ⟹ functor_from_unit b

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F e, b ⟧
functor_from_unit e ∙ F ⟹ functor_from_unit b

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F e, b ⟧
nat_trans_data (functor_from_unit e ∙ F)
  (functor_from_unit b)
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F e, b ⟧
is_nat_trans (functor_from_unit e ∙ F)
  (functor_from_unit b) ?t

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F e, b ⟧
nat_trans_data (functor_from_unit e ∙ F)
  (functor_from_unit b)
 exact (λ _, f).
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: pr1 C₁
b: pr1 C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ pr1 F e, b ⟧
is_nat_trans (functor_from_unit e ∙ F)
  (functor_from_unit b) (λ _ : unit_category, f)
 abstract
          (intros z₁ z₂ g ; cbn ;
           rewrite functor_id, id_left, id_right ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    Let ℓ := pr1 HF _ _ _ internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_nat_trans.

    Definition internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_ob
      : pr1 C₁
      := pr1 (pr1 ℓ) tt.

    Definition internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_mor
      : e --> internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_ob
      := pr1 (pr12 ℓ) tt.

    Definition internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_z_iso
      : z_iso b (pr1 F internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_ob)
      := nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso _ _ (pr122 ℓ)) tt.

    Definition internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_over
      : # (pr1 F) internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_mor
        =
        f · internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_z_iso
      := nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr2 (pr222 ℓ)) tt.

    Definition internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_cartesian
      : is_opcartesian_sopfib F internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_mor
      := internal_sopfib_is_opcartesian_sopfib (pr1 (pr222 ℓ)).
  End OpCleaving.

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
street_opfib F

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
street_opfib F

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F e, b ⟧
∑ (bb : C₁) (ff_i : C₁ ⟦ e, bb ⟧ × z_iso b (F bb)),
# F (pr1 ff_i) = f · pr2 ff_i
× is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 ff_i)

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F e, b ⟧
C₁
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F e, b ⟧
C₁ ⟦ e, ?Goal ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F e, b ⟧
z_iso b (F ?Goal)
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F e, b ⟧
# F ?Goal0 = f · ?Goal1
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F e, b ⟧
is_opcartesian_sopfib F ?Goal0

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F e, b ⟧
C₁
 exact (internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_ob f).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F e, b ⟧
C₁ ⟦ e, internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_ob f ⟧
 exact (internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_mor f).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F e, b ⟧
z_iso b
  (F (internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_ob f))
 exact (internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_z_iso f).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F e, b ⟧
# F (internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_mor f) =
f · internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_z_iso f
 exact (internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_over f).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: internal_sopfib F
e: C₁
b: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F e, b ⟧
is_opcartesian_sopfib F
  (internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_mor f)
 exact (internal_sopfib_is_street_opfib_lift_cartesian f).
  Defined.
End InternalSOpFibToStreetOpFib.

Section StreetOpFibToInternalSOpFib.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_univ_cats}
          {F : C₁ --> C₂}
          (HF : street_opfib F).

  Section IsOpCartesian.
    Context {C₀ : bicat_of_univ_cats}
            {G₁ G₂ : C₀ --> C₁}
            (α : G₁ ==> G₂)
            (Hα : ∏ (x : pr1 C₀), is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)).

    Section Factorization.
      Context {H : C₀ --> C₁}
              {β : G₁ ==> H}
              {δp : G₂ · F ==> H · F}
              (q : β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp).

      Definition pointwise_opcartesian_is_opcartesian_factor_data
        : nat_trans_data (pr1 G₂) (pr1 H)
        := λ x,
           opcartesian_factorization_sopfib
             _
             (Hα x)
             (pr1 β x)
             (pr1 δp x)
             (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x).

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
is_nat_trans (pr1 G₂) (pr1 H)
  pointwise_opcartesian_is_opcartesian_factor_data

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
is_nat_trans (pr1 G₂) (pr1 H)
  pointwise_opcartesian_is_opcartesian_factor_data

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 G₂) f
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) =
opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· # (pr1 H) f

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
# (pr1 G₂) f
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) =
opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· # (pr1 H) f

p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# (pr1 G₂) f
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) =
opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
  (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· # (pr1 H) f

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# F (pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f) =
# F (pr1 α x) · (pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f))
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂

δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# F
  (# (pr1 G₂) f
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
       (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
       (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f)

F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂

q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
     (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
   · # (pr1 H) f) = pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f)

G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧

δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
pr1 α x
· (# (pr1 G₂) f
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
       (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
       (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)) =
pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)

β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
pr1 α x
· (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
     (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
   · # (pr1 H) f) = pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f

HF: street_opfib F

q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)

  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)

# F (pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f) =

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)

β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# F (pr1 β x) · # F (# (pr1 H) f) =
# F (pr1 α x) · (pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · δp x
# F (pr1 β x) · # F (# (pr1 H) f) =
# F (pr1 α x) · (pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · δp x
# F (pr1 β x) · # F (# (pr1 H) f) = ?b
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · δp x
?b =
# F (pr1 α x) · (pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · δp x
# F (pr1 β x) · # F (# (pr1 H) f) = ?b

            
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · δp x
# F (pr1 β x) = ?y'

            exact r.
          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
r:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x: # (pr1 F) (pr1 β x) = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · δp x
# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · δp x · # F (# (pr1 H) f) =
# F (pr1 α x) · (pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · δp x · # F (# (pr1 H) f) =
# F (pr1 α x) · (pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) · (δp x · # F (# (pr1 H) f)) =
# F (pr1 α x) · (pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f))

          apply idpath.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# F
  (# (pr1 G₂) f
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
       (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
       (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f)
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# F (# (pr1 G₂) f)
· # F
    (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
       (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
       (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# F (# (pr1 G₂) f) · pr1 δp y =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f)

          exact (nat_trans_ax δp _ _ f).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
     (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
   · # (pr1 H) f) = pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f)
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
     (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x))
· # F (# (pr1 H) f) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
pr1 δp x · # F (# (pr1 H) f) =
pr1 δp x · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) f)

          apply idpath.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
pr1 α x
· (# (pr1 G₂) f
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
       (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
       (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y)) =
pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
pr1 α x · # (pr1 G₂) f
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) =
pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
pr1 α x · # (pr1 G₂) f
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = ?b

?b = pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
pr1 α x · # (pr1 G₂) f = ?y'

            exact (!(nat_trans_ax α _ _ f)).

α: G₁ ==> G₂

q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)

p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)

· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# G₁ f · α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) =
pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f

pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f

β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y) (pr1 β y)
    (pr1 δp y) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = ?t2

            exact p'.
          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
# G₁ f · pr1 β y = pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f

          exact (nat_trans_ax β _ _ f).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
pr1 α x
· (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
     (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
   · # (pr1 H) f) = pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
    (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x)
· # (pr1 H) f = pr1 β x · # (pr1 H) f

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα x)
  (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x): pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x)
    (pr1 β x) (pr1 δp x)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x
p':= opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute F (Hα y)
  (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y): pr1 α y
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα y)
    (pr1 β y) (pr1 δp y)
    (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q y) = pr1 β y
pr1 α x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F (Hα x) (pr1 β x)
    (pr1 δp x) (nat_trans_eq_pointwise q x) = pr1 β x

          exact p.
      Qed.

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
G₂ ==> H

q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp

β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
nat_trans_data G₂ H
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
is_nat_trans G₂ H ?t

Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)

q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
isaprop (∑ δ : G₂ ==> H, δ ▹ F = δp × α • δ = β)

Hα: ∏ x : pr1 C₀, is_opcartesian_sopfib F (pr1 α x)
H: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
δ₁, δ₂: ∑ δ : G₂ ==> H, δ ▹ F = δp × α • δ = β
x: C₀
# F (pr1 δ₁ x) = pr1 δp x

δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp

β: G₁ ==> H
δp: G₂ · F ==> H · F
q: β ▹ F = (α ▹ F) • δp
(λ _ : pointwise_opcartesian_is_opcartesian_factor q
       ▹ F = δp,
 α • pointwise_opcartesian_is_opcartesian_factor q = β)
  (pointwise_opcartesian_is_opcartesian_over q)
 exact (pointwise_opcartesian_is_opcartesian_comm q).
    Defined.
  End IsOpCartesian.

  Section OpCleaving.
    Context {C₀ : bicat_of_univ_cats}
            {G₁ : C₀ --> C₁}
            {G₂ : C₀ --> C₂}
            (α : G₁ · F ==> G₂).

functor_data (pr1 C₀) (pr1 C₁)

∏ a b : pr1 C₀,
pr1 C₀ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 C₁ ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
pr1 C₀ → pr1 C₁
 exact (λ x, pr1 (HF _ _ (pr1 α x))).

HF: street_opfib F

α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
∏ a b : pr1 C₀,
pr1 C₀ ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ pr1 C₁
  ⟦ (λ x : pr1 C₀, pr1 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))) a,
  (λ x : pr1 C₀, pr1 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))) b ⟧

x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 C₁ ⟦ pr1 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)),
pr1 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)) ⟧

C₁ ⟦ G₁ x, pr1 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)) ⟧

F (pr1 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y))) ⟧

α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F ?g = # F (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))) · ?h

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₁ ⟦ G₁ x, pr1 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)) ⟧
 exact (# (pr1 G₁) f · pr112 (HF _ _ (pr1 α y))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))),
F (pr1 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y))) ⟧
 exact (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF _ _ (pr1 α x)))
                 · # (pr1 G₂) f
                 · pr212 (HF _ _ (pr1 α y))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F
  (# (pr1 G₁) f · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y))) =
# F (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) f · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
 abstract
            (rewrite functor_comp ;
             rewrite (pr122 (HF _ _ (pr1 α x))) ;
             refine (maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (pr122 (HF _ _ (pr1 α y))) @ _) ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             refine (nat_trans_ax α _ _ f @ _) ;
             rewrite !assoc' ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             rewrite z_iso_inv_after_z_iso ;
             rewrite id_left ;
             apply idpath).
    Defined.

HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
is_functor
  street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data

HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x: pr1 C₀
opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
  (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
  (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x)
   · pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
  (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
  (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
     x x (id₁ x)) =
id₁ (pr1 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))

· pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)) =

x: pr1 C₀
id₁ (G₁ x) · pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)) =

          apply id_left.

 apply id_right.

  street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
  (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
  (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
   · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
  (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
  (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
     x z (f · g)) =
opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
  (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
  (# (pr1 G₁) f · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
  (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) f · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
  (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
     x y f)
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
    (# (pr1 G₁) g · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
     · # (pr1 G₂) g
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
    (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
       y z g)

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁ ⟦ G₁ x, pr1 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)) ⟧

F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))),
F (pr1 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))) ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F ?g = # F (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))) · ?h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
     (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
     (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x z (f · g))) = ?h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
     (# (pr1 G₁) f
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 G₂) f
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x y f)
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
       (# (pr1 G₁) g
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
        · # (pr1 G₂) g
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
       (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
          y z g)) = ?h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
    (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
     · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
    (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
       x z (f · g)) = ?g
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))
· (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
     (# (pr1 G₁) f
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 G₂) f
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x y f)
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
       (# (pr1 G₁) g
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
        · # (pr1 G₂) g
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
       (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
          y z g)) = ?g

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁ ⟦ G₁ x, pr1 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)) ⟧
 exact (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g) · pr112 (HF _ _ (pr1 α z))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₂ ⟦ F (pr1 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))),
F (pr1 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))) ⟧
 exact (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF _ _ (pr1 α x)))
                 · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
                 · pr212 (HF _ _ (pr1 α z))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
   · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))) =
# F (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))

α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· # F (pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))) =
# F (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))

g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· # F (pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))) = ?b

g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
# F (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))

# F (pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))) = ?t2

            exact (pr122 (HF _ _ (pr1 α z))).

x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g))
· (pr1 α z · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))) =
# F (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))

α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)) · pr1 α z
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)) =

· inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧

# F (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
α x · # G₂ (f · g) =

· inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
α x =

· inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))

α x · pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))

          exact (pr122 (HF _ _ (pr1 α x))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
     (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
     (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x z (f · g))) =
inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))
 apply opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_over.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
     (# (pr1 G₁) f
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 G₂) f
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x y f)
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
       (# (pr1 G₁) g
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
        · # (pr1 G₂) g
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
       (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
          y z g)) =
inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
     (# (pr1 G₁) f
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
      · # (pr1 G₂) f
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
     (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
        x y f))
· # F
    (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
       (# (pr1 G₁) g
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
        · # (pr1 G₂) g
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
       (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
          y z g)) =
inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 G₂) f · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y))
· (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) g · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))) =
inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))

g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· (# (pr1 G₂) f
   · (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y))
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
         · (# (pr1 G₂) g
            · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))))) =

   · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
    (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
     · # (pr1 G₂) (f · g)
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z)))
    (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
       x z (f · g)) =
# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (G₂ z) (pr1 α z))
 apply opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute.

F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
is_nat_trans (pr1 G₁)

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 G₁) f
· street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor_data
    y =
street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor_data
  x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
    (# (pr1 G₁) f · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
     · # (pr1 G₂) f
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
    (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
       x y f)

G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor_data
  x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
    (# (pr1 G₁) f · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
     · # (pr1 G₂) f
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
    (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
       x y f) =
# (pr1 G₁) f
· street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor_data
    y

      apply opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute.
    Qed.

      : nat_trans_data (pr1 G₂) (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift ∙ F)

x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 G₂) f
· street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_over_nat_trans_data
    y =
street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_over_nat_trans_data
  x
· # F
    (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
       (# (pr1 G₁) f
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
        · # (pr1 G₂) f
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
       (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 G₂) f · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)) =
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))
· # F
    (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
       (# (pr1 G₁) f
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
        · # (pr1 G₂) f
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))
       (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_data_subproof
          x y f))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 G₂) f · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)) =
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))
· (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
   · # (pr1 G₂) f · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)))

α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 G₂) f · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)) =
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x))
· inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (G₂ x) (pr1 α x)))
· # (pr1 G₂) f · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y))

α: G₁ · F ==> G₂

# (pr1 G₂) f · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y)) =

# (pr1 G₂) f · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (G₂ y) (pr1 α y))

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

HF: street_opfib F
internal_sopfib_opcleaving F

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
∑ (h : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧) (γ : G₁ ==> h)
(β : invertible_2cell G₂ (h · F)),
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F γ × γ ▹ F = α • β

(λ _ : is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F ?pr10,
 ?pr10 ▹ F = α • ?pr11) ?pr12

bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
 exact (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift α).

G₁ ==>
street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift α
 exact (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor α).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
invertible_2cell G₂
  (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift α
   · F)
 exact (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_over α).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F
  (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor
     α)
 exact (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_opcartesian α).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₂ ⟧
α: G₁ · F ==> G₂
(λ _ : is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F
         (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor
            α),
 street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_mor α
 ▹ F =
 α
 • street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_over
     α)
  (street_opfib_is_internal_sopfib_opcleaving_lift_opcartesian
     α)
 abstract
        (use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
         intro x ; cbn ;
         exact (pr122 (HF _ _ (pr1 α x)))).
  Defined.

  Section IsOpCartesian.
    Context {C₀ : bicat_of_univ_cats}
            {G₁ G₂ : C₀ --> C₁}
            (α : G₁ ==> G₂)
            (Hα : is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α).

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
∏ a b : pr1 C₀,
pr1 C₀ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 C₁ ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
pr1 C₀ → pr1 C₁
 exact (λ x, pr1 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))).
      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
∏ a b : pr1 C₀,
pr1 C₀ ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ pr1 C₁
  ⟦ (λ x : pr1 C₀,
     pr1
       (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      a,
  (λ x : pr1 C₀,
   pr1
     (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    b ⟧
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 C₁
⟦ pr1 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))),
pr1 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) ⟧

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₁ ⟦ G₁ x,
pr1 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₂
⟦ F
    (pr1
       (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))),
F
  (pr1
     (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F ?g =
# F
  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) · ?h

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₁ ⟦ G₁ x,
pr1 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) ⟧
 exact (# (pr1 G₁) f · pr112 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₂
⟦ F
    (pr1
       (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))),
F
  (pr1
     (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
⟧
 exact (inv_from_z_iso (pr212 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
                 · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
                 · pr212 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F
  (# (pr1 G₁) f
   · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))) =
# F
  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
 abstract
            (rewrite functor_comp ;
             rewrite (pr122 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             etrans ;
             [ apply maponpaths ;
               exact (pr122 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
             | ] ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
             etrans ;
             [ apply maponpaths ;
               exact (nat_trans_ax α _ _ f)
             | ] ;
             rewrite functor_comp ;
             rewrite !assoc' ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             rewrite z_iso_inv_after_z_iso ;
             rewrite id_left ;
             apply idpath).
    Defined.

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
  (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
  (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x)
   · pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
  (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x x (id₁ x)) =
id₁
  (pr1
     (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))

α: G₁ ==> G₂

x: pr1 C₀
C₁ ⟦ G₁ x,
pr1 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) ⟧

    (pr1

F

⟧

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x)
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x x
        (id₁ x))) = ?h

x: pr1 C₀

  (id₁
     (pr1
        (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))) = ?h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x)
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x x
       (id₁ x)) = ?g
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· id₁
    (pr1
       (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) =
?g

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
C₁ ⟦ G₁ x,
pr1 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) ⟧
 exact (pr112 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
C₂
⟦ F
    (pr1
       (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))),
F
  (pr1
     (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
⟧
 apply identity.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
# F
  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) =
# F
  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· id₁
    (F
       (pr1
          (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
             (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))

x: pr1 C₀

  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) =
# F
  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))

          apply idpath.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x)
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x x
        (id₁ x))) =
id₁
  (F
     (pr1
        (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))))

  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))

· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
· pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) =
id₁
  (F

· (# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))

x: pr1 C₀

           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) =

           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) =
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))

· pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) =
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))

           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) =

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

x: pr1 C₀
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (# (pr1 G₁) (id₁ x)
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (id₁ x))
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x x
       (id₁ x)) =
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))

· pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) =

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α

· pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) =

· id₁
    (pr1
       (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) =

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
functor_compax pointwise_oplift_functor_data
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
  (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
  (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
   · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
  (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x z (f · g)) =
opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
  (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
  (# (pr1 G₁) f
   · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
  (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
    (# (pr1 G₁) g
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof y z g)

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁ ⟦ G₁ x,
pr1 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₂
⟦ F
    (pr1
       (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))),
F
  (pr1
     (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F ?g =
# F
  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) · ?h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
     (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x z
        (f · g))) = ?h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (# (pr1 G₁) f
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (# (pr1 G₁) g
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof y z g)) =
?h
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
