α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x z
       (f · g)) = ?g
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (# (pr1 G₁) f
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (# (pr1 G₁) g
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof y z g)) =
?g

        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₁ ⟦ G₁ x,
pr1 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) ⟧
 exact (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
                 · pr112 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
C₂
⟦ F
    (pr1
       (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))),
F
  (pr1
     (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
⟧
 exact (inv_from_z_iso
                   (pr212 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
                 · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
                 · pr212 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))).
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
   · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) =
# F
  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧

· # F
    (pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) =
# F
  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))

   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))

f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧

g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))

   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))

  (pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))

· pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))

· pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))

· pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (# G₂ (f · g))
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) =
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (# G₂ (f · g)) =
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (# G₂ (f · g)) =
id₁ (pr1 F (G₂ x)) · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F (# G₂ (f · g)) = # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))

          apply idpath.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
     (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x z
        (f · g))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))
 apply opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_over.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (# (pr1 G₁) f
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (# (pr1 G₁) g
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof y z g)) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (# (pr1 G₁) f
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f))
· # F
    (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (# (pr1 G₁) g
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof y z g)) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# G₂ f · # G₂ g)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· (# F (# G₂ f) · # F (# G₂ g))
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· (# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
   · (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
      · (inv_from_z_iso
           (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                     (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
         · (# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
            · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                       (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· (# F (# G₂ f)
   · (# F (# G₂ g)
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
   · (# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))) =
# F (# G₂ g)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) =
# F (# G₂ g)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g) = # F (# G₂ g)

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
id₁ (pr1 F (pr1 G₂ y)) · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g) =
# F (# G₂ g)

          apply id_left.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) (f · g))
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x z
       (f · g)) =
# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))
 apply opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute.
        
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (# (pr1 G₁) f
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (# (pr1 G₁) g
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof y z g)) =
# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (# (pr1 G₁) f
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
    (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f)
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
    (# (pr1 G₁) g
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof y z g) =
# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (pr1 G₁) f
· pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
    (# (pr1 G₁) g
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
    (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof y z g) =
# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (pr1 G₁) f
· (pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))
   · opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (# (pr1 G₁) g
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) g)
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))))
       (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof y z g)) =
# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (pr1 G₁) f
· (# (pr1 G₁) g
   · pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))) =
# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (pr1 G₁) f · # (pr1 G₁) g
· pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) =
# (pr1 G₁) (f · g)
· pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y, z: pr1 C₀
f: pr1 C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 C₀ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (pr1 G₁) f · # (pr1 G₁) g
· pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z))) =
# G₁ f · # G₁ g
· pr112 (HF (G₁ z) (pr1 F (G₂ z))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α z)))

          apply idpath.
    Qed.

is_functor pointwise_oplift_functor_data
 exact pointwise_oplift_functor_is_functor.
    Defined.

    Definition pointwise_oplift_nat_trans_data
      : nat_trans_data (pr1 G₁) pointwise_oplift_functor_data
      := λ x, pr112 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))).

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 G₁) f · pointwise_oplift_nat_trans_data y =
pointwise_oplift_nat_trans_data x
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (# (pr1 G₁) f
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
    (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 G₁) f
· pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) =
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (# (pr1 G₁) f
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
    (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
    (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
    (# (pr1 G₁) f
     · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
     · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
    (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f) =
# (pr1 G₁) f
· pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))

      apply opcartesian_factorization_sopfib_commute.
    Qed.

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
∏ x : pr1 C₀,
is_opcartesian_sopfib F
  (pr1 pointwise_oplift_nat_trans x)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: pr1 C₀
is_opcartesian_sopfib F
  (pr1 pointwise_oplift_nat_trans x)

      exact (pr222 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: C₀
C₂ ⟦ (pointwise_oplift_functor ∙ F) x, (G₂ ∙ F) x ⟧

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: C₀
i:= pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
         (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))): (λ _ : C₁ ⟦ G₁ x,
       pr1
         (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))) ⟧,
 z_iso (pr1 F (G₂ x))
   (F
      (pr1
         (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))))
  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
C₂ ⟦ (pointwise_oplift_functor ∙ F) x, (G₂ ∙ F) x ⟧

      exact (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
is_nat_trans (pointwise_oplift_functor ∙ F) (G₂ ∙ F)
  is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_pointwise_opcartesian_over_data

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
is_nat_trans (pointwise_oplift_functor ∙ F) (G₂ ∙ F)
  is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_pointwise_opcartesian_over_data

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (# (pr1 G₁) f
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) · # F (# G₂ f)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) · # F (# G₂ f) =
# F
  (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
     (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
     (# (pr1 G₁) f
      · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
      · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
      · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
     (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F (# G₂ f) =
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (# F
     (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
        (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                  (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
        (# (pr1 G₁) f
         · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                     (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
         · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
         · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
        (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F (# G₂ f) =
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # F
    (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
       (# (pr1 G₁) f
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· # F
    (opcartesian_factorization_sopfib F
       (pr222 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                 (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
       (# (pr1 G₁) f
        · pr112 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
                    (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
        · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
        · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
                   (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))))
       (pointwise_oplift_functor_data_subproof x y f)) =
# F (# G₂ f)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: street_opfib F
C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
               (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
   · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
   · pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))) =
# F (# G₂ f)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y))) =
# F (# G₂ f)
· pr212 (HF (G₁ y) (pr1 F (G₂ y))
           (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α y)))

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x)) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f) = # F (# G₂ f)

      
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

C₀: bicat_of_univ_cats

Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
id₁ (F (G₂ x)) · # (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f) =

Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x, y: C₀
f: C₀ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 G₂) f) = # F (# G₂ f)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x) =

· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))

  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))

G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₀, C₁ ⟧
α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: C₀
?b = # (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)

α: G₁ ==> G₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib F α
x: C₀
# (pr1 F)
  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr212 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
              (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) = ?b

x: C₀
# (pr1 F)
  (pr112 (HF (G₁ x) (pr1 F (G₂ x))
            (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))) = ?y'

        exact (pr122 (HF _ _ (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α x)))).
